name: @colmbyrne/specflow
description: Specs that enforce themselves. Contract tests, journey hooks, and agent orchestration for LLM-driven development.

scripts.postinstall: echo '' && echo '╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗' && echo '║  @colmbyrne/specflow installed                       ║' && echo '╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '║  Run this in EACH project you want to enforce:        ║' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '║    npx @colmbyrne/specflow init .                     ║' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '║  This is per-project (not system-wide) because each   ║' && echo '║  project gets its own hooks, contracts, and CLAUDE.md. ║' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '║  After init, update CLAUDE.md with your project info:  ║' && echo '║    Repository, Project Board, Board CLI, Tech Stack    ║' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝' && echo ''
